title: Pickaxe Drills
body:
This Texture Pack replaces Pickaxes with Drills that are 3D and Animated. Their Speed is based on the Speed of the Pickaxe.
![The Drills In Third Person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ff3f4ae2b86a17a241896ffa329f7b6ff54a10f.png)![All of the Drills on the Ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bcce69516b9f1546e65a9ff231ad0ead4cf0bb3.png)![Drill in First Person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b57774b3190463a11f7f89d007dd9ace65b1de07.png)
